name: Swing Rx - Golf Performance
about: Swing Rx - Golf Performance is a specialized golf training facility focusing on performance enhancement through a combination of chiropractic care, fitness, and personalized coaching. The venue offers comprehensive programs including medical treatments, sports rehabilitation, and nutrition coaching, all designed to improve golf-specific physical capabilities and reduce injury risk. Services include individual lessons, driver fitting with Heatherwoode Golf Club, and both in-person and remote online coaching options, catering to golfers of all levels looking to optimize their game through integrated health and performance strategies.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized performance plans developed by TPI-certified professionals
Integrated approach combining chiropractic care, fitness, and nutrition coaching
Customized driver fitting and instruction with Heatherwoode Golf Club
Remote and in-person coaching options for maximum flexibility

food_and_drink.notes: No food services mentioned, though nutrition coaching is available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers are expected to bring their own clubs for training sessions and lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink services are mentioned, though nutrition coaching is available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific time for simulator rounds is mentioned, as the focus is on performance training rather than full course simulation.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about junior programs or youth-friendly amenities is provided.
